purpose: Map abstract capability slugs (the strings briefModel emits in siteBrief.requestedCapabilities) to the Dossiers that can satisfy them. planningModel reads this in Sprint 2B to know which Dossiers are even candidates before running embedding + rerank. v2 (2026-06-08): mount-only honesty for section_add capabilities — mounting does not promise visible preview render. v3 (ADR 0040): additive optional 'components' field per capability — shadcn component names render/codegen may use, cross-checked against the Starter component-manifest.json files (Component Catalog lager 2). faq-section -> accordion is the pilot.
principles: A capability slug is the contract; the Dossier is the implementation. New capabilities require either a Dossier under packages/generation/orchestration/dossiers/{soft,hard}/ or an explicit empty-list comment so codegen knows to surface the gap.
Empty dossiers list is allowed - it means the capability is recognised but no implementation exists yet. The comment field documents the plan.
default must be one of dossiers when set. It is the planningModel fallback when no other signal differentiates the candidates.
Dossier IDs match folder names under packages/generation/orchestration/dossiers/{soft,hard}/. The dossier's manifest.json declares its class and capability.

Empty capability = gap, not feature. planningModel MUST NOT include a capability with an empty dossiers list in the implemented selectedDossiers of a Site Plan. It MAY surface the gap to the operator (e.g. via a notesForPlanner entry on the Site Brief) so the project either drops the capability, picks a different one or waits for the planned Dossier to be imported.

section_add follow-up (section_builder role): faq + team are visible on the local-service-business scaffold (they surface a grounded dedicated /faq or /team route via the wizard extra-route plumbing, so appliedVisibleEffect=true on a real render; team needs grounded company.team). Every other type is still mount-only: mounting a capability + Dossier into the next version (requestedCapabilities + selectedDossiers.required) does NOT promise visible preview render. An existing render_section_* helper is necessary but not sufficient; visible surfacing of the remaining types is a separate render-path concern (see packages/generation/followup/section_directives.py).

components (optional, ADR 0040): names a capability's allowed shadcn component(s) by file stem (e.g. accordion). Each name MUST exist in at least one enabled Starter's data/starters/<id>/component-manifest.json - scripts/governance_validate.py cross-checks this and a reference to a component absent from every enabled Starter manifest is a gate error, not a silent fallback. The field is additive (Component Catalog lager 2); render/codegen consumption of it is a later slice (lager 3). Per-Starter resolution (which Starter actually carries the component for a given build) is deferred to that slice; lager 2 only guarantees the component is vendored somewhere.

interactive-game.comment: Pacman-style soft Dossier; verified mounted by tests/test_dossier_mounting.py.

contact-form.comment: mailto-contact-form is the safe default (soft, zero env). Mount-only via section_add today; render_section_contact_cta exists but visible preview surfacing is not guaranteed until the dedicated render-path lands. resend-contact-form (hard) planned for server-side delivery.

menu.comment: menu-display is a soft instructions-only Dossier for restaurant/café menus grouped by course with per-item price and dietary markers. No external API; menu data is supplied via project-input or starter content.

booking.comment: booking-cta is a soft instructions-only Dossier rendering a phone/external/mailto CTA with adjacent hours. Hard alternatives (caspeco-api, bokadirekt-api, calendly-embed) are planned imports for sites needing real availability.

gallery.comment: image-gallery is a soft instructions-only Dossier (CSS-grid gallery). Mount-only via section_add today; render_section_gallery exists but visible preview surfacing is not guaranteed until the dedicated render-path lands.

hours.comment: opening-hours is a soft instructions-only Dossier (weekday hours + OpeningHours JSON-LD). Mount-only via section_add today; render_section_hours_summary exists but visible preview surfacing is not guaranteed until the dedicated render-path lands.

reviews.comment: reviews-display is a soft instructions-only Dossier (card grid + Review JSON-LD; static project-input content). Mount-only via section_add today: render_section_reviews-testimonials exists but visible preview surfacing is not guaranteed until the dedicated render-path lands. Hard alternatives (google-places-reviews, trustpilot-widget) planned for live pulls.

location.comment: map-embed is a soft instructions-only Dossier (OSM iframe + address block). Mount-only via section_add today; render_map exists but visible preview surfacing is not guaranteed until the dedicated render-path lands.

pricing.comment: pricing-table is a soft instructions-only Dossier (tier cards + CTAs). Mount-only via section_add today; render_pricing exists but visible preview surfacing is not guaranteed until the dedicated render-path lands.

hero-video.comment: video-hero is a soft instructions-only Dossier rendering an autoplay-muted-loop background video using the native <video> element with poster fallback, preload=metadata, prefers-reduced-motion handling and a foreground text overlay. NO YouTube/Vimeo embed (those ship 600KB trackers). Hard alternatives (mux-player-react, vimeo-player) are planned imports for sites needing adaptive bitrate or playback analytics.

newsletter-subscribe.comment: No Dossier in repo yet. MIN_IDE has mailchimp-newsletter (hard) as the planned import.

payments.comment: No Dossier in repo yet. MIN_IDE has stripe-checkout (hard) as the planned import.

auth.comment: No Dossier in repo yet. MIN_IDE has clerk-auth (hard) as the planned import; supabase-auth is a future alternative.

analytics.comment: No Dossier in repo yet. MIN_IDE has plausible-analytics and vercel-analytics (both hard) as planned imports.

ai-chat.comment: No Dossier in repo yet. MIN_IDE has openai-chat (hard) as the planned import.

error-tracking.comment: No Dossier in repo yet. MIN_IDE has sentry-error-tracking (hard) as the planned import.

faq-section.comment: faq-accordion is a soft instructions-only Dossier (native <details>/<summary> + FAQPage JSON-LD). Visible via section_add on the local-service-business scaffold (2026-06-09): a faq section_add surfaces a grounded dedicated /faq route through the existing render_faq + wizard extra-route plumbing, so appliedVisibleEffect=true on a real render. Other scaffolds keep it mount-only until their renderer set opts into wizard routes. components (ADR 0040 pilot): accordion is vendored in marketing-base/components/ui/accordion.tsx (native <details>/<summary>, zero new deps); render/codegen consumption is lager 3.

carousel.comment: No Dossier in repo yet. MIN_IDE has embla-carousel (soft) as the planned import.

marquee.comment: No Dossier in repo yet. MIN_IDE has marquee-scroller (soft) as the planned import.

command-search.comment: No Dossier in repo yet. MIN_IDE has cmdk-command-palette (soft) as the planned import.

team-section.comment: team-roster is a soft instructions-only Dossier (monogram cards from company.team). Visible via section_add on the local-service-business scaffold (2026-06-09): a team section_add surfaces a grounded dedicated /team route (render_team) through the wizard extra-route plumbing when company.team has named members; an empty team stays honest mount-only (mounted-but-no-content). Other scaffolds keep it mount-only until their renderer set opts into wizard routes.

guarantees.comment: trust-guarantees is a soft instructions-only Dossier ('Varfor oss' icon bullets grounded in trustSignals/USPs/businessFacts). Mount-only via section_add today: render_section_trust_proof exists but visible preview surfacing is not guaranteed until the dedicated render-path lands.
